title: Pink Scented Rose Candle – Romantic Decor for Valentine’S, Weddings & Gifts
features: WAX: 100% Paraffin Wax for a clean burn.
COLOUR: Soft pink hue for a romantic touch.
BURN TIME: Approx. 3 hours of lasting fragrance.
FRAGRANCE: 3% Rose Scented for a soothing floral aroma.
description: Set the mood with the Pink Scented Rose Candle, ideal for Valentine's Day, weddings, anniversaries, and heartfelt gifts. - Crafted from 100% paraffin wax, delivering a clean and consistent burn. - Infused with a delicate rose fragrance, enhancing relaxation and atmosphere. - A beautiful decorative piece perfect for tables, shelves, and cozy corners. - Perfect for romantic dinners, cozy evenings, and thoughtful gifting.
